mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (sender_id, receiver_id, product_id, content, is_read) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{productId}, #{content}, #{isRead})
mapper.select: SELECT cm.*, s.nickname AS sender_nickname, s.avatar AS sender_avatar, r.nickname AS receiver_nickname, r.avatar AS receiver_avatar, p.title AS product_title, p.price AS product_price, (SELECT pi.image_url FROM product_image pi WHERE pi.product_id = cm.product_id AND pi.is_cover = 1 LIMIT 1) AS product_cover_image, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message ucm WHERE ucm.receiver_id = #{userId} AND ucm.sender_id = IF(cm.sender_id = #{userId}, cm.receiver_id, cm.sender_id) AND ucm.is_read = 0) AS unread_count FROM chat_message cm INNER JOIN ( SELECT MAX(id) AS max_id FROM chat_message WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId} GROUP BY LEAST(sender_id, receiver_id), GREATEST(sender_id, receiver_id) ) latest ON cm.id = latest.max_id LEFT JOIN `user` s ON cm.sender_id = s.id LEFT JOIN `user` r ON cm.receiver_id = r.id LEFT JOIN product p ON cm.product_id = p.id ORDER BY cm.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE sender_id = #{senderId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
